## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Ticket

Closes #LP-XX (or related ticket)

## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change (explain below)

## Changes

- List the key changes
- One per line
- Be specific

## Testing

How was this tested?

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe)
- [ ] No tests needed (explain why)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions (CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Ticket markdown file created/updated in docs/tickets/
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if applicable)

## Screenshots (if UI changes)

If this changes UI, include before/after screenshots.

## Notes for Reviewer

Anything specific you want the reviewer to focus on or be aware of.
